name: ALLIENT INC
sic_description: Instruments For Meas & Testing of  Electricity & Elec Signals
summary: Allient Inc. (ALNT) is a company focused on the motion industry, designing and manufacturing products and technologies for motion-related applications. The company pursues growth through acquisitions and new technology development, serving customers across domestic and foreign markets. It manages manufacturing operations including low-cost region facilities and relies on subcontractors and suppliers for parts and components.
